'''Sith drop ships''' were deployed by [[Sith dreadnaught|Sith personnel carriers]], transporting [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith]] troops and war beasts to planetary surfaces.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 3]] {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-07-24 -->{{GamerCite|5|The Sith Compendium}}
*<!-- 2007-11-27 -->[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] {{Po}}
